name: Old Colorado City Farmers Market

Products.value: Fresh produce, handcrafted products, and unique goods from local farms and artisans

notes: On-file record had no website or facebook. Found official site pikespeakfarmersmarkets.com (run by Pikes Peak Farmers Markets) which lists this market at Bancroft Park, 2408 West Colorado Avenue (matches on-file address, no change needed). Season stated as 'June 6th through October 17th' converted to month names. SNAP/EBT, ADA accessibility, certified organic, email, and phone were not clearly stated on the official site or its Facebook page (Facebook content was truncated/inaccessible via fetch).
